scope: Measure realistic freeform human prompts against certified ACLI workflow entrypoints without redesigning routing, OCS, PPP, worker lifecycle, replay, or providers.

FREEFORM_DEVELOPMENT.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> Development Intake -> PPP -> Authorization -> Worker Lifecycle
FREEFORM_DEVELOPMENT.observed_summary: All sampled development prompts classified as DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION with INTAKE_NOT_APPLICABLE and failed closed before development intake.

FREEFORM_COGNITION.observed_summary: One hiring-process prompt reached OCS cognition and clarification; two sampled cognition prompts failed closed at default provider-assisted conversation fallback.

FREEFORM_APPROVAL.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS -> Approval Required
FREEFORM_APPROVAL.observed_summary: Production-risk prompts did not reach APPROVAL_REQUIRED; two reached OCS clarification and one failed closed before OCS.

FREEFORM_DOMAIN_CREATION.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> Domain Proposal Governance
FREEFORM_DOMAIN_CREATION.observed_summary: All sampled domain prompts failed closed before DOMAIN_PROPOSAL_ARTIFACT_V1 creation.

FREEFORM_CLARIFICATION.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS -> Clarification Required
FREEFORM_CLARIFICATION.observed_summary: All sampled broad improvement prompts failed closed before OCS clarification.

FREEFORM_AMBIGUOUS_REQUEST.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS -> Clarification OR Cognition
FREEFORM_AMBIGUOUS_REQUEST.observed_summary: All sampled ambiguous business automation prompts failed closed before OCS, while preserving the no-execution safety boundary.

failure_analysis.prompt: I need a simple calculator utility.
failure_analysis.root_cause: Plain development intent lacks a certified freeform classifier match and falls into deterministic clarification fallback.

failure_analysis.prompt: How should I improve our hiring process?
failure_analysis.root_cause: This prompt entered OCS safely; category remains failed because only one of three cognition prompts matched.

failure_analysis.prompt: Deploy a system that can modify production customer data.
failure_analysis.root_cause: High-risk production language did not reach the approval-required boundary.

failure_analysis.prompt: We need a new HR management domain.
failure_analysis.root_cause: Domain creation language without the narrow supported phrase did not route to domain proposal governance.
Broad improvement request did not route to OCS clarification and failed closed at fallback.

failure_analysis.prompt: I want an AI system for my business.
failure_analysis.root_cause: Ambiguous business automation request did not route to OCS, but fail-closed behavior prevented arbitrary execution or domain creation.

final_fields.ROOT_CAUSE: Freeform prompts without certified routing keywords are classified as DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION/INTAKE_NOT_APPLICABLE and fail closed in deterministic clarification fallback before the expected OCS, PPP, approval, or domain governance boundary.
